Title: Missing Person Report: ~mission(TargetName)
Description:
HURSTON DYNAMICS OUTSOURCING
CONTRACT: Locate Missing Individual
OUTSOURCE MANAGER: I. Takao
RISK ASSESSMENT: Low

The staff at ~mission(Location|Address) has recently filed a missing persons report for one ~mission(TargetName). They have been missing for several days and were last seen heading to the ~mission(Location).

You are being contracted to conduct an onsite search for ~mission(TargetName|Last) and see if you can determine their whereabouts. 

Payment is dependent on returning a record of their current location, alive or dead.




** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **
